intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC裁决趋严，FRAND与商标合规风险升级
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Rulings Tighten; FRAND & Trademark Risks Rise
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年欧洲IP战场呈现司法高效化与合规严苛化双重特征。统一专利法院（UPC）通过撤销多项高价值专利及发布跨多国禁令，确立了对专利有效性严格审查的基调，同时PMAC调解机制上线丰富了争议解决手段。在标准必要专利（SEP）领域，英国法院对FRAND费率的裁定及TTBER新规生效，显著提高了许可谈判的法律确定性要求。商标方面，欧盟法院强化了对声誉保护及反欺骗性注册的监管，德国恶意抢注风险激增。整体而言，欧洲知识产权执法正从单纯的权利确认转向深度的商业合规与反垄断审查。
top_signals: UPC米兰与巴黎分部连续撤销中国军科院及米其林等核心专利，显示法院对专利创造性审查趋于严格。
英国高院裁定三星3.92亿美元一次性付款符合FRAND原则，确立了以历史可比许可评估费率的新标杆。
欧盟法院裁定成员国可强制规定新闻出版者在线使用公平报酬，重塑数字内容版权授权生态。
修订版TTBER于5月生效，为专利池、数据许可及集体谈判提供明确反垄断安全港指引。
cross_currents: 司法效率与实体正义并重：UPC年报显示案件处理高效，但裁判结果并未因此偏向权利人，反而在有效性挑战中展现出独立且严格的审查立场。
全球许可本地化裁决趋势：诺基亚撤回UPC诉讼转投英国寻求全球RAND费率，表明单一法域裁决正成为解决跨国SEP纠纷的首选路径。
品牌叙事合规红线收紧：从“Obelix”商标无效案到Fauré Le Page年份误导案，司法机关对商标声誉关联性及消费者认知真实性的审查颗粒度显著细化。
implications: 针对UPC诉讼策略需调整：鉴于UPC撤销专利的高成功率，中国企业应提前进行FTO分析并准备强有力的现有技术抗辩，避免盲目应诉。
SEP许可谈判需重构模型：企业需重新评估历史许可协议的FRAND属性，利用新指南优化专利池参与策略，防范被认定为sub-FRAND的风险。
商标布局需强化证据链：在德国等市场，面对AI驱动的恶意抢注，企业需建立实时监测机制，并妥善保存在先使用证据以应对无效宣告程序。
watchlist: CJEU关于前药是否可独立获SPC保护的裁决进展，这将直接影响生物医药企业的专利期限补偿策略。
摩尔多瓦加入EPO后（2026年6月生效），欧洲专利体系覆盖范围扩大带来的申请成本与布局机会变化。
英国竞争上诉法庭对高通“无许可无芯片”索赔证据真空的后续影响，以及其对全球反垄断执法的示范效应。

daily_report.headline_zh: 欧盟IP战报：CJEU裁定版权费率滥用，UPC收紧禁令标准
daily_report.headline_en: CJEU Rules on Copyright Abuse; UPC Tightens Injunctions
daily_report.executive_line: 本周欧盟IP执法趋严：CJEU确立版权费率反垄断红线，UPC提高临时禁令举证门槛，德国强化商标恶意注册打击，企业合规与诉讼策略需即时调整。
daily_report.summary_zh: 本窗口期欧洲知识产权领域呈现“司法限权”与“行政严管”双重态势。CJEU在版权与专利SPC资格上作出关键裁决，明确费率需挂钩实际经济价值，并受理前药保护新议题。UPC杜塞尔多夫分院显著收紧临时禁令标准，要求单一产品特征严格比对。同时，德国DPMA警示AI驱动的恶意商标抢注激增，而修订版TTBER生效为SEP许可提供新安全港。企业需立即审查版权计费模式及专利证据链完整性。

report_items.title_zh: CJEU裁决请求：前药是否可独立获SPC保护？
report_items.title_en: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.title: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.summary_zh: 爱尔兰律所HGF分析指出，CJEU已受理案件（C-794/25），需裁定已获批活性成分的前药能否独立获得补充保护证书（SPC）。背景涉及武田制药的LDX（右旋安非他命前药）与母药DEX。尽管LDX作为新活性物质获批上市，但法规对前药是否属“同一活性物质”存疑。此裁决将澄清行业争议，解决相关诉讼，明确前药在欧盟的SPC资格标准。
core_points_zh: CJEU受理前药SPC资格案，需裁定前药能否独立于母药获保护
争议焦点在于前药是否因安全性或疗效显著不同而视为新活性物质
裁决结果将消除法律不确定性，直接影响欧盟药品专利策略布局
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。

report_items.title_zh: 德国商标申请中的恶意注册：企业日益增长的风险
report_items.title_en: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险
遭遇恶意指控时，应积极收集在先使用证据，依法提起无效宣告以维权

report_items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解
report_items.title_en: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，成为解决IP纠纷的优选。WIPO数据显示2025年案件激增42%，中小企业占比高。欧盟层面，EUIPO扩大调解服务范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解中心。调解由中立专家主持，灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供法院无法给予的商业解决方案，有助于建立双赢局面。
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议

report_items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院裁定：临时禁令需证明单一产品侵权
report_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Dismisses Preliminary Injunction: Strict Single-Product Infringement Proof Required
report_items.title: LD Düsseldorf, May 12, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1747/2025
report_items.summary_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在2026年5月12日裁决中驳回申请人临时禁令请求。法院强调，申请人须充分证明侵权行为发生的可能性大于不可能性。针对隐形牙套专利，法院认定所有技术特征必须体现在单个产品中，不同阶段的牙套不能组合认定侵权。因申请人仅依赖宣传材料且缺乏具体技术分析，未能满足举证标准，法院未审理有效性等其他抗辩理由。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Düsseldorf dismissed an applicant’s request for preliminary injunctions on May 12, 2026. The Court emphasized that applicants must demonstrate with sufficient certainty that infringement is more likely than not. Regarding clear aligner patents, the ruling established that all technical features of a method claim must be embodied within a single product. Consequently, different treatment phases executed by separate aligners cannot be combined to establish infringement. Since the applicant relied exclusively on promotional materials without providing specific technical...
core_points_zh: 申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性
方法权利要求的所有特征必须在单个对齐器中实现，不可跨阶段组合
仅凭宣传材料和推测性证言不足以确立复杂技术领域的侵权事实
core_points_en: Applicants bear the burden of proof in provisional measures, requiring demonstration that infringement is more likely than not.
All method claim features must be realized within a single aligner; features across different treatment stages cannot be aggregated.
Promotional materials and speculative witness statements are insufficient to prove infringement in complex technical fields.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国医疗器械企业出口欧洲时，应警惕UPC对‘单一产品’特征的严格解释。在应对临时禁令指控时，需准备详尽的技术比对分析，避免仅依赖营销材料。建议提前进行FTO分析，确保多阶段治疗方案不落入同一专利的单一产品权利要求范围，以规避高额诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: This decision underscores the UPC’s strict interpretation of 'single product' requirements for multi-stage medical treatments like clear aligner therapy. Parties seeking or defending against preliminary injunctions must prepare detailed, feature-by-feature technical comparisons rather than relying on marketing collateral. For companies operating in Europe, this highlights the necessity of conducting thorough Freedom-...
insight_points_zh: 重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险
完善技术证据链，避免仅凭营销材料应对复杂的专利侵权指控
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strict adherence to single-product infringement definitions is critical for multi-stage medical device strategies.
Practice note: Develop comprehensive technical evidence chains avoiding reliance on general marketing materials for legal defense.
What to monitor: UPC case law regarding the aggregation of features across distinct treatment phases in method claims.

report_items.title_zh: Taylor Wessing聘请Eisenführ Speiser合伙人强化德国专利业务
report_items.title_en: Taylor Wessing Strengthens German Patent Practice with Key Hires from Eisenführ Speiser
report_items.title: Taylor Wessing bolsters German patent practice with Eisenführ Speiser hires
report_items.summary_zh: 国际律所Taylor Wessing宣布将于6月1日吸纳两名来自Eisenführ Speiser的新合伙人，以重建其德国专利实践团队。此举旨在弥补去年秋季大规模团队分拆后的实力损失，恢复该所在德国专利领域的传统优势。新加入的合伙人Michael Schneider拥有逾20年专利诉讼经验，尤其在移动通信领域具备深厚专长。这一人事变动凸显了律所在竞争激烈的德国市场中巩固其知识产权服务地位的战略意图。
report_items.summary_en: International law firm Taylor Wessing has announced the recruitment of two new partners from Eisenführ Speiser, effective June 1. This strategic move aims to rebuild its German patent practice team following the significant departure of a large group last autumn. The hires are intended to restore the firm’s former strength and traditional advantages in the German patent sector. Among the new additions is Michael Schneider, who brings over twenty years of experience in patent litigation, with specialized expertise in mobile communications technologies. This personnel change highlights Taylor We...
core_points_zh: Taylor Wessing于6月1日引入两名新合伙人以强化德国专利团队
此举旨在修复去年团队分拆影响，恢复其在德国市场的领先地位
新合伙人Michael Schneider深耕移动通信领域二十余年专利诉讼
core_points_en: Taylor Wessing recruits two new partners on June 1 to significantly strengthen its German patent litigation team capabilities.
The hiring strategy addresses previous team departures, aiming to restore the firm's leading market position in Germany.
New partner Michael Schneider offers over twenty years of specialized patent litigation experience in mobile communications.

report_items.summary_en: The UK Competition Appeal Tribunal has formally approved the discontinuance of a £480 million opt-out collective action claim against Qualcomm. The court highlighted a significant evidentiary void within the case, primarily due to the absence of testimony from critical industry players such as Apple and Samsung. This legal challenge stemmed from controversies surrounding Qualcomm’s well-known 'no licence, no chips' commercial strategy. Ultimat...

report_items.summary_en: On 16 April 2026, the European Commission adopted the revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation (TTBER) and accompanying Guidelines, effective 1 May 2026. This new framework replaces the 2014 rules, maintaining the established safe harbour structure under Article 101(3) TFEU for agreements meeting market share thresholds and avoiding hardcore restrictions. Significantly, the revised Guidelines provide detailed competition law guidance for modern licensing structures, including technology pools, standard-essential technology (SEP) licensing, data licensing, and licensing negotiatio...
core_points_zh: 修订版TTBER及指南于2026年5月1日生效，取代2014年框架
新增对专利池、数据许可及标准必要技术许可的详细竞争法指导
企业需优化复杂许可协议结构以规避反垄断风险并享受安全港保护
core_points_en: The revised TTBER and Guidelines enter into force on 1 May 2026, replacing the previous 2014 regulatory framework.
New provisions offer specific competition law guidance for patent pools, data licensing, and standard-essential technology arrangements.
Companies must optimize complex licensing agreement structures to ensure antitrust compliance and qualify for safe harbour protection.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国科技企业应密切关注新规对SEP许可及专利池的合规要求，特别是在参与集体谈判时。建议重新审查现有许可协议，确保不包含核心限制条款，并利用新指南优化FRAND谈判策略，以降低在欧面临的反垄断调查与诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: Stakeholders involved in technology licensing should closely monitor the updated compliance requirements for SEP licensing and patent pool participation, particularly regarding collective negotiation mechanisms. It is advisable to review existing licensing agreements to ensure they do not contain hardcore restrictions that could jeopardize block exemption status. Furthermore, parties should utilize the new Guidelines...

利用新指南优化专利池参与及集体谈判策略

Practice note: Leverage updated guidelines to optimize participation in patent pools and structure collective negotiation strategies effectively.
What to monitor: Evolving enforcement priorities regarding hardcore restrictions and compliance in complex technology transfer arrangements.

report_items.title_zh: CJEU：忽视入住率的版权费率过高或构成滥用市场支配地位

report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟法院裁定捷克集体管理组织OSA向酒店收取固定版权费未考虑房间入住率，可能违反TFEU第102条构成滥用支配地位。法院强调版权许可费应与被许可人实际获得的经济价值成比例，若行政上可行，忽略入住率等实际使用情况的定价属不公平高价。该裁决要求版权收费机制必须反映真实经济价值，对欧盟内版权许可实践具有深远影响。
core_points_zh: CJEU裁定忽略入住率的固定版权费率可能构成滥用市场支配地位
版权许可费必须与被许可人实际获得的经济价值及作品使用情况成比例
若行政可行，集体管理组织需采用基于实际使用（如入住率）的计费方法

insight_points_zh: 在欧中企应审查版权许可费是否与实际使用情况挂钩以规避反垄断风险
可依据CJEU判例主张固定费率不公，通过谈判或诉讼争取合理计费方式

report_items.title_zh: CJEU裁决请求：前药是否可独立获SPC保护？
report_items.title_en: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.title: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.summary_zh: 爱尔兰律所HGF分析指出，CJEU已受理案件（C-794/25），需裁定已获批活性成分的前药能否独立获得补充保护证书（SPC）。背景涉及武田制药的LDX（右旋安非他命前药）与母药DEX。尽管LDX作为新活性物质获批上市，但法规对前药是否属“同一活性物质”存疑。此裁决将澄清行业争议，解决相关诉讼，明确前药在欧盟的SPC资格标准。
core_points_zh: CJEU受理前药SPC资格案，需裁定前药能否独立于母药获保护
争议焦点在于前药是否因安全性或疗效显著不同而视为新活性物质
裁决结果将消除法律不确定性，直接影响欧盟药品专利策略布局
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。

report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险

report_items.title_en: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，成为解决IP纠纷的优选。WIPO数据显示2025年案件激增42%，中小企业占比高。欧盟层面，EUIPO扩大调解服务范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解中心。调解由中立专家主持，灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供法院无法给予的商业解决方案，有助于建立双赢局面。
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议

report_items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院裁定：临时禁令需证明单一产品侵权
report_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Dismisses Preliminary Injunction: Strict Single-Product Infringement Proof Required
report_items.title: LD Düsseldorf, May 12, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1747/2025
report_items.summary_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在2026年5月12日裁决中驳回申请人临时禁令请求。法院强调，申请人须充分证明侵权行为发生的可能性大于不可能性。针对隐形牙套专利，法院认定所有技术特征必须体现在单个产品中，不同阶段的牙套不能组合认定侵权。因申请人仅依赖宣传材料且缺乏具体技术分析，未能满足举证标准，法院未审理有效性等其他抗辩理由。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Düsseldorf dismissed an applicant’s request for preliminary injunctions on May 12, 2026. The Court emphasized that applicants must demonstrate with sufficient certainty that infringement is more likely than not. Regarding clear aligner patents, the ruling established that all technical features of a method claim must be embodied within a single product. Consequently, different treatment phases executed by separate aligners cannot be combined to establish infringement. Since the applicant relied exclusively on promotional materials without providing specific technical...
core_points_zh: 申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性
方法权利要求的所有特征必须在单个对齐器中实现，不可跨阶段组合
仅凭宣传材料和推测性证言不足以确立复杂技术领域的侵权事实
core_points_en: Applicants bear the burden of proof in provisional measures, requiring demonstration that infringement is more likely than not.
All method claim features must be realized within a single aligner; features across different treatment stages cannot be aggregated.
Promotional materials and speculative witness statements are insufficient to prove infringement in complex technical fields.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国医疗器械企业出口欧洲时，应警惕UPC对‘单一产品’特征的严格解释。在应对临时禁令指控时，需准备详尽的技术比对分析，避免仅依赖营销材料。建议提前进行FTO分析，确保多阶段治疗方案不落入同一专利的单一产品权利要求范围，以规避高额诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: This decision underscores the UPC’s strict interpretation of 'single product' requirements for multi-stage medical treatments like clear aligner therapy. Parties seeking or defending against preliminary injunctions must prepare detailed, feature-by-feature technical comparisons rather than relying on marketing collateral. For companies operating in Europe, this highlights the necessity of conducting thorough Freedom-...
insight_points_zh: 重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险
完善技术证据链，避免仅凭营销材料应对复杂的专利侵权指控
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strict adherence to single-product infringement definitions is critical for multi-stage medical device strategies.
Practice note: Develop comprehensive technical evidence chains avoiding reliance on general marketing materials for legal defense.
What to monitor: UPC case law regarding the aggregation of features across distinct treatment phases in method claims.

report_items.title_zh: Taylor Wessing聘请Eisenführ Speiser合伙人强化德国专利业务
report_items.title_en: Taylor Wessing Strengthens German Patent Practice with Key Hires from Eisenführ Speiser
report_items.title: Taylor Wessing bolsters German patent practice with Eisenführ Speiser hires
report_items.summary_zh: 国际律所Taylor Wessing宣布将于6月1日吸纳两名来自Eisenführ Speiser的新合伙人，以重建其德国专利实践团队。此举旨在弥补去年秋季大规模团队分拆后的实力损失，恢复该所在德国专利领域的传统优势。新加入的合伙人Michael Schneider拥有逾20年专利诉讼经验，尤其在移动通信领域具备深厚专长。这一人事变动凸显了律所在竞争激烈的德国市场中巩固其知识产权服务地位的战略意图。
report_items.summary_en: International law firm Taylor Wessing has announced the recruitment of two new partners from Eisenführ Speiser, effective June 1. This strategic move aims to rebuild its German patent practice team following the significant departure of a large group last autumn. The hires are intended to restore the firm’s former strength and traditional advantages in the German patent sector. Among the new additions is Michael Schneider, who brings over twenty years of experience in patent litigation, with specialized expertise in mobile communications technologies. This personnel change highlights Taylor We...
core_points_zh: Taylor Wessing于6月1日引入两名新合伙人以强化德国专利团队
此举旨在修复去年团队分拆影响，恢复其在德国市场的领先地位
新合伙人Michael Schneider深耕移动通信领域二十余年专利诉讼
core_points_en: Taylor Wessing recruits two new partners on June 1 to significantly strengthen its German patent litigation team capabilities.
The hiring strategy addresses previous team departures, aiming to restore the firm's leading market position in Germany.
New partner Michael Schneider offers over twenty years of specialized patent litigation experience in mobile communications.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国通信企业应关注德国专利诉讼团队变动，特别是具有移动通信背景的资深律师动向。这预示着德国专利诉讼活跃度可能提升，建议提前评估潜在风险，优化在德国市场的IP布局与应诉策略，必要时建立与该类强势律所的合作或预警机制。
report_items.insight_en: Market participants should monitor personnel shifts within top-tier German patent firms, particularly those involving senior litigators with deep telecommunications backgrounds. Such moves often signal increased activity and competitiveness in high-stakes patent litigation sectors. Companies operating in Europe should proactively assess potential litigation risks associated with these evolving legal landscapes. It is...
insight_points_zh: 关注德所人员变动，预判移动通信领域专利诉讼活跃度上升
提前优化在欧IP布局，建立针对资深诉讼专家的应对与合作机制
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor staffing changes at leading German firms to anticipate heightened litigation activity in mobile communications.
Practice note: Proactively refine European IP strategies and defense mechanisms to address potential risks from experienced litigators.
What to monitor: Track the integration of senior specialists into major practices to identify emerging legal threats and partnership opportunities.

report_items.title_zh: 英法院指出高通“无许可无芯片”索赔存在证据真空
report_items.title_en: UK Tribunal Dismisses Qualcomm Collective Action Over Evidentiary Gaps and Missing Key Witnesses
report_items.title: UK court observes “evidentiary void” in withdrawn Qualcomm 'no licence, no chips' claim
report_items.summary_zh: 英国竞争上诉法庭（CAT）批准撤销一项针对高通的4.8亿英镑集体诉讼索赔。法院指出该案存在严重的“证据真空”，主要因为苹果和三星等关键证人缺席，且缺乏高通拒绝供应芯片的确凿证据。此案源于高通著名的“无许可，无芯片”商业策略引发的反垄断争议，最终因举证不足而终止。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Competition Appeal Tribunal has formally approved the discontinuance of a £480 million opt-out collective action claim against Qualcomm. The court highlighted a significant evidentiary void within the case, primarily due to the absence of testimony from critical industry players such as Apple and Samsung. Furthermore, the tribunal noted a distinct lack of concrete evidence demonstrating that Qualcomm refused to supply chips to coerce licensing agreements. This legal challenge stemmed from controversies surrounding Qualcomm’s well-known 'no licence, no chips' commercial strategy. Ultimat...
core_points_zh: 英国竞争上诉法庭批准撤销针对高通的4.8亿英镑集体诉讼
法院认定案件存在“证据真空”，缺乏苹果三星等关键证人
原告未能提供高通拒绝供应芯片以强迫许可的确凿证据
core_points_en: The Competition Appeal Tribunal approved dismissing a £480 million opt-out collective action claim against Qualcomm due to insufficient evidence.
The court identified a severe evidentiary void caused by the non-participation of key witnesses like Apple and Samsung.
Claimants failed to provide conclusive proof that Qualcomm refused chip supplies to force patent licensing agreements.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This outcome underscores the critical importance of robust evidence chains in complex standard-essential patent disputes. Merely alleging abuse of market position is insufficient without substantiating facts. Rights holders and defendants must prioritize securing cooperation from key industry participants and maintaining comprehensive records of licensing negotiations. Effective internal compliance reviews and detail...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Securing testimony from key industry participants is vital for proving or defending SEP-related competition claims.
Practice note: Maintain meticulous records of all licensing negotiations to demonstrate compliance and counter refusal-to-supply allegations.
What to monitor: Judicial trends regarding evidentiary standards for collective actions involving standard-essential patents and market dominance.

report_items.title_zh: 修订版TTBER下技术许可：专利池、FRAND及集体谈判指南更清晰
report_items.title_en: Revised EU TTBER: Enhanced Guidance on Patent Pools, FRAND, and Collective Negotiations
report_items.title: Technology licensing under the revised TTBER: clearer guidance for pools, FRAND and collective negotiations
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟委员会于2026年4月16日通过修订版《技术转移集体豁免条例》(TTBER)及配套指南，将于5月1日生效。新规保留原有安全港结构，但细化了针对专利池、标准必要技术(SEP)许可及集体谈判的合规指导。对于涉及复杂许可模式的企业，需重点评估协议结构以降低反垄断风险，确保符合TFEU第101(3)条要求。
report_items.summary_en: On 16 April 2026, the European Commission adopted the revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation (TTBER) and accompanying Guidelines, effective 1 May 2026. This new framework replaces the 2014 rules, maintaining the established safe harbour structure under Article 101(3) TFEU for agreements meeting market share thresholds and avoiding hardcore restrictions. Significantly, the revised Guidelines provide detailed competition law guidance for modern licensing structures, including technology pools, standard-essential technology (SEP) licensing, data licensing, and licensing negotiatio...
core_points_zh: 修订版TTBER及指南于2026年5月1日生效，取代2014年框架
新增对专利池、数据许可及标准必要技术许可的详细竞争法指导
企业需优化复杂许可协议结构以规避反垄断风险并享受安全港保护
core_points_en: The revised TTBER and Guidelines enter into force on 1 May 2026, replacing the previous 2014 regulatory framework.
New provisions offer specific competition law guidance for patent pools, data licensing, and standard-essential technology arrangements.
Companies must optimize complex licensing agreement structures to ensure antitrust compliance and qualify for safe harbour protection.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国科技企业应密切关注新规对SEP许可及专利池的合规要求，特别是在参与集体谈判时。建议重新审查现有许可协议，确保不包含核心限制条款，并利用新指南优化FRAND谈判策略，以降低在欧面临的反垄断调查与诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: Stakeholders involved in technology licensing should closely monitor the updated compliance requirements for SEP licensing and patent pool participation, particularly regarding collective negotiation mechanisms. It is advisable to review existing licensing agreements to ensure they do not contain hardcore restrictions that could jeopardize block exemption status. Furthermore, parties should utilize the new Guidelines...
insight_points_zh: 重新审查SEP许可协议以符合新规反垄断合规要求
利用新指南优化专利池参与及集体谈判策略
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Review SEP licensing agreements to align with new antitrust compliance requirements under the revised TTBER.
Practice note: Leverage updated guidelines to optimize participation in patent pools and structure collective negotiation strategies effectively.
What to monitor: Evolving enforcement priorities regarding hardcore restrictions and compliance in complex technology transfer arrangements.

report_items.title_zh: CJEU：忽视入住率的版权费率过高或构成滥用市场支配地位
report_items.title_en: Copyright royalty rates excessive of economic value may be abusive of dominant position, rules CJEU against Czech CMO
report_items.title: Copyright royalty rates excessive of economic value may be abusive of dominant position, rules CJEU against Czech CMO
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟法院裁定捷克集体管理组织OSA向酒店收取固定版权费未考虑房间入住率，可能违反TFEU第102条构成滥用支配地位。法院强调版权许可费应与被许可人实际获得的经济价值成比例，若行政上可行，忽略入住率等实际使用情况的定价属不公平高价。该裁决要求版权收费机制必须反映真实经济价值，对欧盟内版权许可实践具有深远影响。
core_points_zh: CJEU裁定忽略入住率的固定版权费率可能构成滥用市场支配地位
版权许可费必须与被许可人实际获得的经济价值及作品使用情况成比例
若行政可行，集体管理组织需采用基于实际使用（如入住率）的计费方法
report_items.insight_zh: 在欧运营酒店、餐饮及娱乐设施的中国企业应重新审查现有版权许可协议。若支付固定费用且未挂钩实际使用情况，可依据此判例主张费率不公并寻求调整。建议评估历史缴费记录，必要时通过谈判或法律途径争取更公平的计费方式，以降低合规成本并规避反垄断风险。
insight_points_zh: 在欧中企应审查版权许可费是否与实际使用情况挂钩以规避反垄断风险
可依据CJEU判例主张固定费率不公，通过谈判或诉讼争取合理计费方式

daily_audio_latest.headline_zh: 欧盟IP战报：CJEU裁定版权费率滥用，UPC收紧禁令标准
daily_audio_latest.summary_zh: 本窗口期欧洲知识产权动态呈现“司法收紧”与“合规细化”双重特征。CJEU裁定忽视实际使用率的固定版权费率构成市场支配地位滥用，为反垄断合规划定新界；UPC杜塞尔多夫分院严格限制临时禁令，要求证明单一产品侵权，提升维权难度。同时，修订版TTBER生效明确SEP许可竞争法指南，德国警示AI辅助的恶意商标抢注风险。建议企业重新评估版权与专利许可结构，完善技术证据留存，并加强德国市场的商标监控。

transcript_lines_zh: 今天是2026年5月21日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，CJEU受理前药SPC资格案，需裁定前药能否独立于母药获保护。后续要看欧洲层面会不会出现进一步官方动作或配套安排。
再看第二条，德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击。值得关注的是，尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险。

今天是2026年5月21日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，CJEU受理前药SPC资格案，需裁定前药能否独立于母药获保护。后续要看欧洲层面会不会出现进一步官方动作或配套安排。
再看第二条，德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击。值得关注的是，尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险。
再看第三条，调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高。值得关注的是，优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险。
最后看第四条，申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性。值得关注的是，重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕专利、商标、SEP标准必要专利展开，接下来值得继续关注英国竞争上诉法庭对高通案件撤销后的后续监管动向。

topics.headline_en: UPC Evolves: PMAC Launches, Case Law Tightens Infringement Standards
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）加速完善PMAC调解机制并上线案件系统，推动ADR成为低成本解纷新路径。司法层面，杜塞尔多夫等分院在等同原则、功能性限定及临时禁令举证上确立严格标准，同时上诉庭强化程序合规审查。企业需警惕单一零部件侵权风险，优化权利要求布局，并利用撤诉规则灵活应对诉讼策略。
key_points: PMAC程序规则获批且系统上线，调解仲裁覆盖单一专利及SEP/FRAND纠纷，提供高效替代性争议解决渠道。
司法判例趋严：等同判定具累积性，功能性限定扩大保护范围至单独部件，临时禁令需证明单一产品特征完整实现。
程序合规红线明确：上诉期自附理由判决日起算，逾期人为错误可救济但需严格核查，登录系统不视为应诉管辖。
actions: 优先利用PMAC及EUIPO调解机制处理跨境IP争议，降低维权成本；在合同中预设调解条款以掌握主动权。
全面排查对欧出口硬件的专利风险，避免使用易引发直接侵权的功能性限定语言，优化权利要求布局。
建立严格的UPC诉讼期限双重核查机制，善用“可原谅错误”条款申请救济，并谨慎管理官网涉诉声明以防反制。
watchlist: 关注UPC主要分部早期判例对欧洲专利法解释趋势的影响，预判法律确定性变化。
监测PMAC在SEP/FRAND纠纷中的实际裁决案例，评估其对许可谈判格局的重塑作用。
追踪成员国公约加入状态对单一专利效力的潜在影响，动态调整传统验证与单一专利的组合策略。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) significantly advanced its alternative dispute resolution framework by approving procedural rules for the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) and launching its online case management system. This development establishes mediation and arbitration as efficient, lower-cost pathways for resolving Unitary Patent and SEP/FRAND disputes. Concurrently, judicial practice has hardened. Local Divisions in Düsseldorf and Hamburg have established strict standards for equivalence, functional claim limitations, and preliminary injunctions, requiring proof that all technical features are embodied within a single product. The Court of Appeal has reinforced procedural compliance, clarifying that passive system access does not constitute jurisdictional appearance and confirming the applicability of withdrawal rules to provisional measures...

Judicial standards are tightening: equivalence criteria are cumulative, functional language like 'mountable' defines standalone product scope rather than systems, and preliminary i...
Procedural compliance is strictly enforced: appeal deadlines run from the reasoned judgment date, passive Case Management System login does not establish jurisdiction under Brussel...
actions_en: Prioritize PMAC and EUIPO mediation mechanisms for cross-border IP conflicts to lower enforcement costs, and include pre-dispute mediation clauses in commercial contracts to retain...
Audit hardware exports for patent risks by avoiding broad functional claim language that may inadvertently expand infringement scope to individual components, ensuring claims align...
watchlist_en: Monitor early precedents from key UPC Local Divisions to anticipate shifts in European patent law interpretation, particularly regarding equivalence and functional limitations.
Track initial PMAC rulings in SEP/FRAND contexts to assess how non-litigation outcomes may reshape licensing negotiation dynamics and settlement benchmarks.
Observe changes in member state ratification status affecting Unitary Patent territorial coverage, adjusting validation strategies between traditional national routes and unitary p...

topics.headline_zh: 欧洲SEP：英国定费率，UPC强禁令
topics.headline_en: UK Sets Global FRAND Rates; UPC Strengthens Injunctions
topics.summary_zh: 2025-2026年欧洲SEP格局剧变。英国法院确立全球FRAND费率裁定权并倾向仲裁，UPC强化禁令与反禁诉令(AASI)以对抗中国临时许可。NPE利用UPC活跃诉讼，车企加速加入Avanci等专利池。监管层面，欧盟修订TTBER明确竞争规则，UKIPO推进SEP改革。中企需警惕高额交叉许可判决及管辖权冲突风险。
key_points: 英国司法主导：高院裁定3.92亿美元全球FRAND费率，上诉法院确认含仲裁条款的要约可中止诉讼，确立“合同转向”。
UPC攻势升级：曼海姆等地签发反禁诉令(AASI)对抗中国临时许可，NPE利用新平台加剧勒索，实施者须即时表达许可意愿。
合规与生态：欧盟新版TTBER生效规范专利池与集体谈判；车企/终端厂加速融入Avanci/Via等许可体系以规避诉讼。
actions: 立即审查对欧许可策略，收到侵权通知须书面即时表达善意许可意愿，避免丧失抗辩权或被判禁令。
评估加入Avanci/Sisvel等专利池的成本效益，利用一站式许可降低多法域诉讼风险及合规成本。
针对英国潜在的高额FRAND裁决，提前准备可比协议证据链，并审慎处理中英平行诉讼中的管辖权冲突。
watchlist: 英国最高法院在特斯拉等案中关于全球费率管辖权的最终立场。
UKIPO即将发布的SEP监管改革细则及其对许可透明度的具体要求。
UPC在ZTE诉三星等案中关于FRAND费率裁定的程序框架演变。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The European SEP landscape is undergoing significant transformation between 2025 and 2026. UK courts have asserted jurisdiction to determine global FRAND rates, exemplified by the Samsung v ZTE judgment, while validating arbitration-linked licensing offers as a mechanism to control dispute venues. Concurrently, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) has intensified enforcement measures, issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions to counter foreign interim licenses and clarifying procedural rules that favor patentees in FRAND defenses. Non-practicing entities are increasingly leveraging this platform for aggressive litigation. Regulatory developments include the EU’s revised TTBER, which clarifies competition rules for patent pools, and UKIPO initiatives aimed at enhancing licensing transparency. Implementers face heightened risks of cross-jurisdictional conflicts and substantial financial exposure, nece...
key_points_en: UK Judicial Dominance: Courts establish global FRAND rate precedents and validate arbitration clauses in licensing offers, shifting dispute resolution away from traditional litigat...
UPC Enforcement Escalation: The court issues anti-anti-suit injunctions against foreign interim licenses and adopts procedural rules that prioritize patentee submissions in FRAND d...
actions_en: Immediately review European licensing strategies and ensure written, immediate expression of willingness to license upon receiving infringement notices to preserve FRAND defenses.
Evaluate the cost-benefit ratio of joining major patent pools such as Avanci or Sisvel to leverage one-stop licensing solutions and reduce multi-jurisdictional litigation exposure.
Prepare robust comparable agreement evidence chains for potential UK FRAND determinations and carefully manage parallel proceedings to address jurisdictional conflicts.
watchlist_en: The UK Supreme Court's final stance on global rate jurisdiction in pending appeals involving major technology firms.
Upcoming UKIPO regulatory reform details regarding SEP transparency requirements and their impact on licensing negotiations.
Evolution of the UPC's procedural framework for FRAND rate determinations in high-profile cases such as ZTE v Samsung.

topics.headline_en: EUIPO Tightens Trademark Scrutiny While Launching SME Funding and IP Financing Initiatives
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧盟商标司法实践趋严。法院强调异议权利需全程有效，驳回纯技术动态商标，并强化对恶意注册及声誉评估的审查。同时，EUIPO推出中小企业基金降低注册成本，并发布报告推动IP融资以释放创新资金。企业需应对合规挑战，善用政策红利优化全球品牌布局与资产运营。
key_points: 司法审查趋严：CJEU裁定异议期间在先权利须持续有效，纯技术功能动态商标因缺乏显著性被驳回，且武器类“Obelix”案显示声誉评估需全局考量。
恶意注册风险激增：德国警示利用AI策略性抢注未注册标志，无真实使用意图的注册面临无效风险，电商下架威胁加剧。
政策利好与融资机遇：EUIPO中小企业基金提供费用报销，新报告建议通过IP抵押释放5800亿欧元创新融资，助力企业降本增效。
actions: 建立权利动态监控机制，确保异议或诉讼期间在先商标持续有效、续展合规，避免因权利灭失导致维权失败。
尽早完成核心市场（如德国）商标注册并建立监测体系，防范AI驱动的恶意抢注；遭遇指控时积极收集在先使用证据。
申请EUIPO中小企业基金补贴以降低欧盟商标成本，同时规范IP管理，探索知识产权质押融资以拓宽资金渠道。
watchlist: 关注欧洲层面是否就“Obelix”案等裁判口径出台更明确的声誉评估配套指南。
跟踪欧盟关于纯技术功能动态商标驳回标准的后续司法实践及立法动态。
留意塞浦路斯等成员国在数字时代品牌价值保护方面的规则细化及配套安排。
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, European Union trademark jurisprudence demonstrated increased rigor regarding rights validity and distinctiveness. The Court of Justice emphasized that earlier rights must remain valid throughout opposition proceedings, while the General Court rejected motion marks lacking distinctive character due to purely technical functionality. Additionally, reputation assessments in infringement cases now require a comprehensive global evaluation of evidence. Concurrently, the EUIPO introduced the SME Fund to offset registration costs for eligible enterprises. A new EUIPO report further outlines strategies to unlock substantial innovation financing by leveraging intellectual property as collateral. These developments necessitate robust portfolio management to maintain compliance, mitigate bad faith risks, and optimize asset valuation for financial opportunities.
key_points_en: Judicial scrutiny has intensified: The CJEU mandates that earlier rights remain valid during oppositions, while pure technical motion marks are refused for lacking distinctiveness...
Bad faith registration risks are escalating: Authorities warn against strategic filings without genuine use intent, particularly those driven by AI tools targeting unregistered sig...
Policy incentives and financing options are expanding: The EUIPO SME Fund offers fee reimbursements for EU and national applications. New reports suggest leveraging IP assets for c...
actions_en: Implement dynamic monitoring systems to ensure prior rights remain valid and renewed throughout opposition or litigation periods, preventing dismissal due to rights lapse.
Secure early trademark registrations in key markets and establish watch services to counter AI-driven bad faith filings; actively gather evidence of prior use to defend against inf...
Apply for EUIPO SME Fund subsidies to reduce registration expenses, while standardizing IP asset management and valuation processes to prepare for potential IP-backed financing arr...
watchlist_en: Monitor whether EU authorities issue clearer guidelines on reputation assessment methodologies following recent high-profile invalidation decisions.
Track subsequent judicial practices and legislative updates concerning the registrability standards for motion marks based on technical functionality.
Observe regulatory refinements in member states like Cyprus regarding digital brand value protection and associated administrative frameworks.

topics.headline_en: UKIPO Warns of Serious Risks from Counterfeit Toner and Ink Cartridges
topics.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局警示假冒碳粉危害，指出造假者常免责且不赔偿。全球假冒贸易额高达4670亿美元，多关联有组织犯罪。出口企业需建立合规溯源体系以防范供应链指控；进口商应加强供应商尽调，避免采购不明来源低价耗材，强化品牌保护与防伪措施。
key_points: 假冒碳粉致损严重且造假者常免责不赔
全球假冒贸易达4670亿美元并关联有组织犯罪
需建立合规溯源体系及加强供应商尽调
actions: 建立产品合规溯源体系防范供应链指控
加强进口供应商尽职调查规避低价风险
强化品牌防伪保护措施应对假冒威胁
watchlist: 欧盟及英国对假冒耗材执法力度变化
全球假冒贸易网络与有组织犯罪关联动态
跨境供应链合规监管政策更新趋势
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued a warning regarding the significant harms caused by counterfeit ink and toner cartridges, particularly affecting small businesses. The blog highlights that while often perceived as low-risk, fake print consumables can cause severe operational damage. Global trade in counterfeit goods is estimated at USD 467 billion, frequently linked to serious organized criminal networks. Counterfeit manufacturers typically bear no liability or compensation responsibility for damages incurred. Businesses must implement strict procurement systems and compare product features to identify fakes on online platforms. Establishing robust IP compliance and traceability systems is essential to prevent involvement in counterfeit supply chains. Conducting thorough supplier due diligence helps avoid procuring unverified, low-cost consumables. These measures are critic...
key_points_en: Counterfeit print consumables cause serious business damage, yet manufacturers bear no liability or compensation responsibility.
Global counterfeit trade reaches approximately USD 467 billion, frequently linked to serious organized criminal networks.
Businesses must implement strict procurement systems and compare product features to identify fakes on online platforms.
actions_en: Establish strict IP compliance and traceability systems to prevent involvement in counterfeit supply chains.
Conduct thorough supplier due diligence to avoid procuring unverified, low-cost consumables.
Strengthen brand anti-counterfeiting protection measures to address counterfeit threats effectively.
watchlist_en: Changes in enforcement intensity regarding counterfeit consumables in the EU and UK.
Developments linking global counterfeit trade networks with organized criminal activities.
Trends in updates to cross-border supply chain compliance regulatory policies.
